name: meeting-decision-intelligence
purpose: Judge whether meetings produce actionable decisions — not just discussion. A composable system of 5 judgment lenses.
composition_rules: decision-state is always the primary — it classifies the meeting state first
owner-accountability activates when tasks lack named owners
risk-escalation activates when blockers or timeline conflicts exist
conflicts between packages must be surfaced, not blended
routing_questions: Does the meeting contain a specific decision or just discussion?
Are action items assigned to named owners?
Are there unresolved blockers that conflict with stated timelines?
